Alisher Ergashev

Artist, Central Asia — Uzbekistan

My artworks sit at the intersection of impressionism and magic realism, drawing inspiration from the globalization process, the culture of Central Asia, nature, and dreams.

Impressionism Plein Air Magical Realism

About the artist

Painter from the
heart of Central Asia

A follower of the classical academic school of painting, Alisher Ergashev has been specializing in soulful landscapes, still lifes, and elements of magic realism since 1990. He trained at the Tashkent State Art Institute, receiving formal education in painting and drawing.

In his work, Alisher aims to create a strong sense of place and atmosphere — capturing the essence of his subjects through bold strokes of color and light. His goal is always to transport the viewer into that world.

His works have been exhibited in galleries and museums in Uzbekistan and abroad. He is a member of the Uzbekistan Artists Union.

35+Years of practice
200+Works created
15+Exhibitions
